### Scores
- Correctness & Rigor: 5 — Implementation is mathematically sound with formal proofs
- Performance & Efficiency: 5 — O(n log n) complexity, optimal for this problem class
- Security: 4 — No attack surface exposed; standard library dependencies only
- Technical Consistency: 5 — Follows established codebase patterns precisely

### Overall Analysis
An exemplary implementation with formal correctness guarantees. Performance characteristics are optimal for the problem class. The only minor concern is the lack of fuzzing in the test suite, but this does not rise to the level of a risk.

### Verdict
Approve

### Risks and Concerns
None
